title: University Grants Commission (Recruitment) (Secretary and Additional Secretary) (Amendment) Rules, 1984
description: University Grants Commission (Recruitment) (Secretary and Additional Secretary) (Amendment) Rules, 1984
text: UNIVERISTY OF GRANTS COMMISSION BAHADUR SHAH ZAFAR MARG NEW DELHI MINISTRY OF EDUCATION AND CULTURE (Department of Education) New Delhi 14 November, 1984 NOTIFICATION GSR – In exercise of powers conferred by sub section (1) read with clause (d) of sub section (2) of section 25 of the University Grants Commission Act, 1956, (3 of 1956), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the University Grants Commission (Recruitment) Rules, 1983, namely: 1. Short title and commencement (1) These rules may be called the University Grants Commission (Recruitment) (Amendment) Rules, 1984. (2) They shall come into force from the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. Amendment of the Schedule In the schedule to the University Grants Commission (Recruitment) Rules, 1983, for serial numbers 2 relating to the posts of Secretary and Additional Secretary and the entries relating to thereto, the following serial number and entries shall substitued, namely:– 76 -- 1 of 3 -- Gazette Notifications 77 THE SCHEDULE S.
